bonus_languages_note.value: Draconic, Dwarven, Elven, Giant, Goblin, Orc.

value.name: Defensive Training
value.description: +4 dodge bonus to AC vs creatures of the giant subtype.

value.name: Gnome Magic
value.description: +1 to DC of illusion spells; SLAs (1/day): dancing lights, ghost sound, prestidigitation, speak with animals (Cha 11+).

value.name: Hatred
value.description: +1 racial bonus on attack rolls vs humanoid creatures of the reptilian and goblinoid subtypes.

value.name: Illusion Resistance
value.description: +2 racial saving throw bonus against illusion spells and effects.

value.name: Obsessive
value.description: +2 racial bonus on a Craft or Profession skill of their choice.

value.name: Small
value.description: +1 size to AC and attack; +4 size to Stealth; -1 CMB/CMD; lifting/carrying 3/4 of medium.

value.name: Weapon Familiarity
value.description: Treat any weapon with 'gnome' in name as martial.
